message:
chore(release): bump version to 0.2.0

This release marks a major milestone: completion of all 30 beads in the
testing-tasks-v2 initiative, bringing comprehensive test coverage to
the MCP Agent Mail coordination server.

Release Highlights:
===================

📊 COMPREHENSIVE TEST COVERAGE (26 new test suites)
---------------------------------------------------
- P0 Regression: datetime handling, session context persistence
- P1 Core: contact management, message delivery, file reservations
- P2 Guards: pre-commit and pre-push enforcement (34 tests)
- P2 HTTP: authentication, rate limiting, server/transport (40+ tests)
- P2 CLI: mail, archive, and guard commands (70+ tests)
- P2 Errors: database failures, git archive failures, invalid inputs
- P3 Security: path traversal prevention, input sanitization
- P3 Concurrency: multi-agent stress testing with resilience
- P3 Performance: MCP tool latency benchmarks
- P4 E2E: multi-agent development workflow, disaster recovery

🔧 BUG FIXES (11 fixes)
-----------------------
- fix(llm): repair double-checked locking initialization race condition
- fix(datetime): use naive UTC datetimes for SQLite compatibility
- fix(app,http): improve project identity and rate limit handling
- fix: improve LRU repo cache to prevent EMFILE errors
- fix: improve test robustness and document put() behavior
- Multiple linter and code review fixes across test files

📈 STATISTICS
-------------
- 65 commits since v0.1.5
- 30/30 beads completed (testing-tasks-v2)
- All 424+ tests passing
- Average lead time: 2.9 hours per bead

Breaking Changes: None
Deprecations: None
Migration: No action required

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@ build-backend = "hatchling.build"
 
 [project]
 name = "mcp-agent-mail"
-version = "0.1.5"
+version = "0.2.0"
 description = "Coordinated multi-agent messaging and coordination MCP server."
 readme = "README.md"
 requires-python = ">=3.14"
